allow: PowerShell($now = Get-Date; $start = [datetime]"2026-06-10 23:35:04"; $elapsed = \($now - $start\).TotalMinutes; Write-Host "Elapsed: $\([math]::Round\($elapsed,1\)\) min"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\workspace\\RL_AGV\\results\\logs\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($proc = Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; $now = Get-Date; $start = [datetime]"2026-06-10 23:35:04"; $elapsed = \($now - $start\).TotalMinutes; Write-Host "경과: $\([math]::Round\($elapsed,1\)\)분 | CPU: $\([math]::Round\($proc.CPU/60,1\)\)분 | 메모리: $\([math]::Round\($proc.WorkingSet/1MB,0\)\)MB")

PowerShell($proc = Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($proc\) { $start = [datetime]"2026-06-10 23:35:04"; $elapsed = \(\(Get-Date\) - $start\).TotalMinutes; Write-Host "프로세스: 실행중 | 경과: $\([math]::Round\($elapsed,1\)\)분 | CPU: $\([math]::Round\($proc.CPU/60,1\)\)분 | 메모리: $\([math]::Round\($proc.WorkingSet/1MB,0\)\)MB" } else { Write-Host "프로세스: 종료됨" })
